name: http_request
description: Makes an HTTP request to the specified URL.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The URL to make the HTTP request to.

arguments.name: method
arguments.description: The HTTP method to use (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE). Defaults to GET.

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: An object containing HTTP headers to send with the request.

arguments.name: body
arguments.description: The request body content to send.

arguments.name: http_proxy
arguments.description: HTTP proxy URL to use for the request.

arguments.name: https_proxy
arguments.description: HTTPS proxy URL to use for the request.

arguments.name: redact_headers
arguments.description: Whether to redact sensitive header values in error messages.

examples.title: Basic HTTP request
examples.source:
. = parse_json!(http_request!("https://httpbin.org/get"))

# Redact the origin ip
.origin = redact!(.origin, filters: [r'.*'], redactor: {"type": "text", "replacement": "***"})
# Delete any ids in headers
.headers = filter(object!(.headers)) -> |key, _value| { !contains(key, "id", false) }
.

examples.title: HTTP PUT request
examples.source:
. = parse_json!(http_request!("https://httpbin.org/put", method: "put"))

# Redact the origin ip
.origin = redact!(.origin, filters: [r'.*'], redactor: {"type": "text", "replacement": "***"})
# Delete any ids in headers
.headers = filter(object!(.headers)) -> |key, _value| { !contains(key, "id", false) }
.

examples.title: HTTP POST request with body
examples.source:
. = parse_json!(http_request!("https://httpbin.org/post", method: "post", body: "{\"data\":{\"hello\":\"world\"}}"))

# Redact the origin ip
.origin = redact!(.origin, filters: [r'.*'], redactor: {"type": "text", "replacement": "***"})
# Delete any ids in headers
.headers = filter(object!(.headers)) -> |key, _value| { !contains(key, "id", false) }
.

notices:
This function performs synchronous blocking operations and is not recommended for
frequent or performance-critical workflows due to potential network-related delays.
